response.justification: Aisha brings genuine breadth — 13+ years across distributed systems, full-stack, embedded, and recent AI-agent tooling — with languages that overlap the JD (JavaScript, C++, C#). However, the role's core domain is experimentation platform engineering: A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout risk management, bias detection, and cross-team measurement systems. None of that appears anywhere in the resume. Additionally, the current title is Senior Software Developer, a meaningful gap from the Principal/IC6 target, and there is no evidence of the multi-workstream technical leadership or growth-measurement ownership the position requires.
strengths: 13+ years of engineering across distributed systems, web, mobile, and embedded domains, with required languages (JavaScript, C++, C#) represented
Demonstrated high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second, low-latency async I/O), showing production-scale credibility
Active AI tooling and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq align with the role's preference for candidates who use AI to accelerate engineering velocity
concerns: Zero visible experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, rollout automation, bias detection, or statistical analysis at scale
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work; the resume lacks any growth measurement, data pipeline, or product analytics ownership

Current seniority (Senior Software Developer) is two levels below Principal/IC6, with no evidence of cross-team architectural leadership, stakeholder alignment, or multi-workstream initiative ownership

key_factors.factor: Seniority and leadership gap vs. Principal/IC6
